description: Composition Grey polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash with warm water using a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean Nothing exudes class and elegance as much as a Levi's polo t-shirt. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair it with classic denims and suede shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
